comments.author: @RealLifeExplorer.US26
comments.text: I knew Indomie was popular, but hearing that it's used as an unofficial currency in some parts of Africa completely sent me!

replies.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
replies.text: Thanks for bringing this up! The global economic footprint of a simple noodle brand like Indomie always opens up truly fascinating layers. Appreciate you watching the documentary and sharing your takeaway. Hope to see your thoughts on our upcoming videos!
